name: deepmiro
description: Swarm prediction engine — simulate hundreds of AI agents to predict how communities react to events, policies, and announcements.

interface.shortDescription: Predict anything with AI agent swarms
interface.longDescription: Feed DeepMiro a document or scenario. It creates hundreds of AI personas — journalists, officials, critics, supporters — and lets them debate on simulated social platforms. You get back a prediction report and a living world you can interrogate agent by agent.
defaultPrompt: predict how will people react to
